queries.question: What id, role, and name of attendees are associated with each conference?
queries.sql: SELECT Participants.id, Participants.role, Participants.name  from Press_Conferences_Participants join Participants on Press_Conferences_Participants.participant_id = Participants.id join Press_Conferences on Press_Conferences_Participants.press_conference_id = Press_Conferences.id   GROUP BY Press_Conferences_Participants.participant_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Press_Conferences_Participants.press_conference_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Press_Conferences)

queries.question: What id, role, and name of attendees are associated with each conference?
queries.sql: select press_conferences.name , participants.id , participants.role , participants.name from Press_Conferences_Participants join Participants on Press_Conferences_Participants.participant_id = Participants.id join Press_Conferences on Press_Conferences_Participants.press_conference_id = Press_Conferences.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?id ?role ?name2 WHERE {
  ?press_conferences_participants a :Press_Conferences_Participants .
  ?participants a :Participants .
  ?press_conferences_participants p:hasParticipants ?participants .
  ?press_conferences a :Press_Conferences .
  ?press_conferences_participants p:hasPress_Conferences ?press_conferences .
  ?press_conferences p:name ?name .
  ?participants p:id ?id .
  ?participants p:role ?role .
  ?participants p:name ?name2 .
}

queries.question: List the IDs and participant names shared by all press conferences.
queries.sql: SELECT Participants.id, Participants.name  from Press_Conferences_Participants join Participants on Press_Conferences_Participants.participant_id = Participants.id join Press_Conferences on Press_Conferences_Participants.press_conference_id = Press_Conferences.id   GROUP BY Press_Conferences_Participants.participant_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Press_Conferences_Participants.press_conference_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Press_Conferences)

queries.question: List the names of all participants that are attending any press conference at least once.
queries.sql: SELECT Participants.name  from Press_Conferences_Participants join Participants on Press_Conferences_Participants.participant_id = Participants.id join Press_Conferences on Press_Conferences_Participants.press_conference_id = Press_Conferences.id   GROUP BY Press_Conferences_Participants.participant_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Press_Conferences_Participants.press_conference_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Press_Conferences)

queries.question: What ID of participants is common for all press conferences?
queries.sql: SELECT Participants.id  from Press_Conferences_Participants join Participants on Press_Conferences_Participants.participant_id = Participants.id join Press_Conferences on Press_Conferences_Participants.press_conference_id = Press_Conferences.id   GROUP BY Press_Conferences_Participants.participant_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Press_Conferences_Participants.press_conference_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Press_Conferences)

queries.question: What are the participant IDs associated with each press conference?
queries.sql: select press_conferences.name , participants.id from Press_Conferences_Participants join Participants on Press_Conferences_Participants.participant_id = Participants.id join Press_Conferences on Press_Conferences_Participants.press_conference_id = Press_Conferences.id

PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?id WHERE {
  ?press_conferences_participants a :Press_Conferences_Participants .
  ?participants a :Participants .
  ?press_conferences_participants p:hasParticipants ?participants .
  ?press_conferences a :Press_Conferences .
  ?press_conferences_participants p:hasPress_Conferences ?press_conferences .
  ?press_conferences p:name ?name .
  ?participants p:id ?id .
}

queries.question: Give me the participant roles that all press conferences have in common.
queries.sql: SELECT Participants.role  from Press_Conferences_Participants join Participants on Press_Conferences_Participants.participant_id = Participants.id join Press_Conferences on Press_Conferences_Participants.press_conference_id = Press_Conferences.id   GROUP BY Press_Conferences_Participants.participant_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Press_Conferences_Participants.press_conference_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Press_Conferences)
